summary.en: Kazakhstan does not use an EU-style outdoor-equipment noise directive as the main power-tool market-access gate. Noise risk for power tools is managed through national occupational health and safety, workplace exposure, user information, and product instruction expectations, while electrical and EMC market access remains under EAEU technical regulations.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦并不以欧盟式户外设备噪声指令作为电动工具市场准入主门槛。电动工具噪声风险主要通过国家职业健康安全、工作场所暴露、用户信息和产品说明要求管理，而电气和 EMC 市场准入仍按 EAEU 技术法规处理。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦並不以歐盟式戶外設備噪聲指令作為電動工具市場准入主門檻。電動工具噪聲風險主要通過國家職業健康安全、工作場所暴露、使用者資訊和產品說明要求管理，而電氣和 EMC 市場准入仍按 EAEU 技術法規處理。

standards_or_laws: Kazakhstan occupational health and safety requirements for workplace noise exposure
Product instructions and warnings supporting safe use
No EU-style outdoor-noise directive as the main Kazakhstan power-tool market-access route

summary.en: China power-tool files may include GB 3883 or GB/T 3883 noise and vibration information, safety instructions, and factory user-manual warnings. These can support labeling and instructions but do not replace Kazakhstan occupational-safety or workplace-use obligations.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件可能包含 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 下的噪声和振动信息、安全说明及工厂用户手册警示。这些可支持标签和说明书，但不能替代哈萨克斯坦职业安全或工作场所使用义务。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件可能包含 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 下的噪聲和振動資訊、安全說明及工廠使用者手冊警示。這些可支持標籤和說明書，但不能替代哈薩克斯坦職業安全或工作場所使用義務。

gap.en: The gap is usually over-classification or under-documentation: exporters should not invent an EU outdoor-noise approval for Kazakhstan, but they should keep noise and vibration information consistent in manuals, warnings, and workplace-facing materials.
gap.zh: 常见差距是过度分类或文件不足：出口商不应为哈萨克斯坦虚构欧盟户外噪声批准，但应确保说明书、警示和面向工作场所的材料中噪声与振动信息一致。
gap.zht: 常見差距是過度分類或文件不足：出口商不應為哈薩克斯坦虛構歐盟戶外噪聲批准，但應確保說明書、警示和面向工作場所的材料中噪聲與振動資訊一致。

mandatory_status.target: No standalone EU-style outdoor-noise market-access directive for ordinary power tools; national occupational health and safety and user-information obligations remain relevant.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB 3883 or GB/T 3883 noise information can support manuals but does not define Kazakhstan workplace obligations.

source.publisher: Adilet Legal Information System of Regulatory Legal Acts of the Republic of Kazakhstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat noise as an EU-style outdoor-noise approval issue for Kazakhstan; keep measured noise and vibration information, warnings, and workplace-use instructions aligned with national OHS expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要将噪声作为哈萨克斯坦的欧盟式户外噪声批准事项处理；应使测得噪声和振动信息、警示及工作场所使用说明与国家职业健康安全预期保持一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要將噪聲作為哈薩克斯坦的歐盟式戶外噪聲批准事項處理；應使測得噪聲和振動資訊、警示及工作場所使用說明與國家職業健康安全預期保持一致。
